title: tacz+
description: tacz+ is a mod that add guns knifes tactical armor and more
body:
tcaz+ is a tactical mod that adds guns and kifes from the tacz mod and it also add tactical armor exploasives and much more

![tacZ+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9efee2075a3b75bbd60a278a37abcc3d4fac9df8_0.webp)

tacz: https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero/versions

the mod adds the following

1.tacz defult weapons
2.tacz addons like (gernades ,melees and more)
3.C4 ,booms and land mines
4.tactical arrmor
